creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
This can be removed for FreeBSD 13.2 hosts, but must remain for FreeBSD 12.4 hosts.

re:

* https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/release/12.4.0/usr.sbin/services_mkdb/services
